zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Turnbull於1315年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏洛利時，他的父親William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto26歲，母親Margaret Douglas20歲。他於1340年與Lady Mary Haliburton在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Turnbull于1315年出生在英国苏格兰費伏洛利时，他的父亲William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto26岁，母亲Margaret Douglas20岁。他于1340年与Lady Mary Haliburton在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Turnbull
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham and Northumberland) and Scottish: occupational name for one who herds bulls, from Middle English turne-bole, a compound of Middle English t(o)urnen ‘turn, direct, steer’ + bul(l)e ‘bull’. Compare Bulman and Bullard.
Scottish (Roxburghshire): in the Scottish borderlands the name was either confused with or derived from   Trumble  .

variants.name: Bulman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name for a keeper of a bull or bulls, from Middle English bule ‘bull’ + man ‘man’. In Ireland, this has been a common name in Cork since the 17th century.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German Bullmann (see Bullman ).

variants.name: Trumble
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from a Middle English personal name T(h)rumbald (Old English Trumbeald, from trum ‘strong’ + beald ‘brave’).
Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Tremblay (Eure).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Turnbull was born in 1315, in Lochgelly, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Douglas, was 20. He married Lady Mary Haliburton in 1340, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1355, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Turnbull est né en 1315, à Lochgelly, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Haliburton en 1340, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1355, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Turnbull 1315 in Lochgelly, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Douglas 20. Er hat 1340 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Mary Haliburton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Turnbull è nato il nel 1315 nel Lochgelly, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Douglas, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Haliburton nel 1340, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1355, nel Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Turnbullが1315年にイギリススコットランドフィフロチジェリーで生まれた時，父William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Mintoは26歳，母Margaret Douglasは20歳であった。1340年にイギリススコットランドでLady Mary Haliburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Turnbull(이)가 1315년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 럭그리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Douglas(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lady Mary Haliburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Turnbull nasceu em 1315, em Lochgelly, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Haliburton em 1340, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Turnbull родился в 1315 г. в местности лочгелли, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Haliburton в 1340 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Turnbull nació en 1315, en Lochgelly, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Rule Turnbull Baron of Minto, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Douglas, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Haliburton en 1340, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1355, en Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
